# M Tashriful Alom
> High School Student & Developer based in Milan, Italy. Specialized in AI, Computer Science, and Social Innovation.

## Summary
M Tashriful Alom is a student at IIS Giovanni Giorgi, Milan (Class of 2028), pursuing a diploma in Computer Science and Telecommunications. He is recognized for his protoype called Voce Civica for the Make It Real Contest organized by Fondazione Mondo Digitale and Amazon Italia.

## Featured Project: Voce Civica
- **Concept:** An AI-powered prototype for citizens to report urban decay.
- **Affiliations:** Developed for the "Make It Real" contest by Amazon and Fondazione Mondo Digitale.
- **Recognition:** Winner of the Make It Real competition at RomeCup 2026, recognized as one of the top civic-tech projects in Italy; presented at Amazon (Novara) during Inside Innovation Day.

## Key Achievements & Awards
- **RomeCup 2026 - National Winner (Make It Real):** Awarded for developing "Voce Civica", an AI-powered civic engagement platform recognized as the top project in the competition.
- **Bocconi Mathematical Games 2026:** Semifinalist (Category L1) in the International Mathematical Games Championships at Bocconi University.
- **Erasmus+ Alumnus:** Participated in the Youth Exchange for Intercultural Entrepreneurship (Chianciano Terme, 2025).

## Technical Skills & Certifications
- **Core Competencies:** Python, AI Development, Ethical Hacking, Systems & Networks, Web Development (UX Focus).
- **Certifications:** - Ethical Hacker (Cisco Networking Academy - 70 hours)
  - AI on Edge Systems / Jetson Nano (NVIDIA)
  - Python AI Developer (Mimo.org)
  - Rocket Science for Everyone (Yale University via Coursera)

## Experience
- **Volunteer Work:** 50+ hours as a Volunteer Cashier at IBVA Solidando (Social Market in Milan), supporting families in need.
- **Freelance Web Development:** Professional freelance history on Fiverr (2023–2024) serving international clients.

## Languages
- Bengali (Native)
- English (B2 - Upper Intermediate)
- Italian (B1 - Intermediate)
